posts.author: isaac.pemberton (Isaac Pemberton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Currently the Audit log only monitors when a file has been downloaded but not when one has been uploaded. I’m from a large company where we need to monitor all files on the platform for sensitive data and the lack of auditing for uploads makes this difficult. My proposal would be a “file uploaded” event with a link to the file so it can be quickly viewed.

Thanks,

Isaac
